name: index
visual_summary: The index component is a reusable UI element that displays a list of items in a registry style layout. Developers can use this component to showcase a collection of items with images and descriptions. It is ideal for displaying a portfolio, products, or services.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready card component with the following characteristics:

Name: index
Description: The index component is a reusable UI element that displays a list of items in a registry style layout. Developers can use this component to showcase a collection of items with images and descriptions. It is ideal for displaying a portfolio, products, or services.
Style: material, flat
Interactions: scrollable, clickable
Tags: registry, list, gallery, style

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
